steps.name: Verify the login page is open
$("by text: Log into Your Account") should be(visible)
Verify the projects page is open
Verify the projects page is open
Create project 'Heaney, McLaughlin and Goodwin' with multiple suites support
Verify the project creation form is open
$("[data-testid='addEditProjectAnnouncement'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Non harum harum rerum distinctio rem.)
$("by text: Successfully added the new project.") should be(visible)

parameters.name: project
parameters.value: Project(name=Heaney, McLaughlin and Goodwin, description=Non harum harum rerum distinctio rem.)

steps.name: Verify the projects page is open
Go to Test Suites & Cases section
$("by text: Add Test Suite") should be(visible)
$("[data-testid='editSectionDescription'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Quidem aut non quisquam consequatur occaecati corporis.)

parameters.name: suite
parameters.value: Suite(name=Suite_quo, description=Quidem aut non quisquam consequatur occaecati corporis.)

steps.name: Verify the suite is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test suite")
Add test case 'Blanditiis perferendis consequatur ut officia consectetur expedita nihil.' to suite
Verify the test case creation form is open
Create test case 'Blanditiis perferendis consequatur ut officia consectetur expedita nihil.'
$("[data-testid='addEditCaseTitle']") set value(Blanditiis perferendis consequatur ut officia consectetur expedita nihil.)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Blanditiis perferendis consequatur ut officia consectetur expedita nihil., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Blanditiis perferendis consequatur ut officia consectetur expedita nihil., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

steps.name: Verify the test case is created successfully
$("with text: Successfully added the new test case.") should be(visible)
Go to Test Runs & Results section
Open the test run creation form

parameters.name: run
parameters.value: TestRun(name=Run_voluptatibus, description=Eum ut non vel placeat tempore ratione doloremque.)

steps.name: Verify the test run is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test run")
Close test run
